title: oreocereus fossulatus
intro: Oreocereus fossulatus, also known as the evening star cactus, is a species of cactus native to the coastal mountains of Peru. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oreocereus fossulatus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems and roots can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
